creator: rhh@ct.picker.com
text:
I have just uploaded 4 ports for inclusion in the 2.2 and 3.0-current
        ports/packages trees:

          awesfx.tar.gz
          awemidi.tar.gz
          gmod-awe.tar.gz
          playmidi-awe.tar.gz

        These ports support the new AWE sound driver, committed by jkh on
        11/15.  

        The first two are NEW ports.  The latter two are replacements for
        existing ports (ports updated for AWE driver support).

Fix: 

Please incorporate into 2.2 and 3.0 port trees and build packages.

        Also, please delete awedrv-0.1.6-port.tgz from /pub/FreeBSD/incoming
        (an old AWE driver version) and, if not already done, discard the
        PR submitted requesting its inclusion in the kernel.  -- Thanks.
How-To-Repeat: 
        N/A
